subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down from this heaven that encompasseth the dominion of earth and heaven, and clear evidences have appeared from this Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات من هذه السماء التی احاطت الملک و الملکوت و ظهرت البینات من هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
